ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the record */,
  "year_open" REAL /* Opening value for the year */,
  "year_close" REAL /* Closing value for the year */,
  "year_min" REAL /* Minimum value recorded for the year */,
  "year_max" REAL /* Maximum value recorded for the year */,
  "year_average" REAL /* Average value calculated for the year */,
  "year_change" TEXT /* Change in value compared to the previous year */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region identifier for the year's data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data for that year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the year's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate indicator (e.g., Temperature, CO2 levels) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (numeric, categorical) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (daily, monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NOAA, NASA) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., Government, Research Institution) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the source's website or data page */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data_sets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the climate indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the data */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the data file */,
  "data_quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data quality check performed on the dataset */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic coverage of the dataset */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sets_data_quality_check_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_quality_check_id") REFERENCES data_quality_checks ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES climate_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sets_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES climate_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_sets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* List of the user's research interests */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "default_permissions" TEXT /* Default permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES climate_data_sets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "key_findings" TEXT /* Key findings from the report */,
  "visualizations" TEXT /* List of visualizations included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES climate_data_sets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., Annual Report, Monthly Summary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "template_file" TEXT /* Template file used for the report type */,
  "default_fields" TEXT /* Default fields included in the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., data update, report completion) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes regarding the check */,
  "checker_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality check (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "check_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES climate_data_sets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_checker_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
